allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**d.get\('dependencies',{}\), **d.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}; keys=['react-native-worklets','metro-cache-key','snack-content','react-native-vector-icons','@gorhom/bottom-sheet']; [print\(f'{k}: {deps.get\(k, \\"NOT FOUND\\"\)}'\) for k in keys]")

Bash(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('package.json'\)\); removed=['react-native-worklets','metro-cache-key','snack-content','react-native-vector-icons','@gorhom/bottom-sheet']; deps={**d.get\('dependencies',{}\),**d.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}; print\('Removed packages \(should all be NOT FOUND\):'\); [print\(f'  {k}: {deps.get\(k,\\"NOT FOUND\\"\)}'\) for k in removed]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('app.json'\)\); patterns=d['expo']['assetBundlePatterns']; print\('assetBundlePatterns:'\); [print\(f'  {p}'\) for p in patterns]")
Bash(node -e "try { require.resolve\('@expo/ngrok'\); console.log\('found'\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('not found:', e.message.split\('\\n'\)[0]\); }")
Bash(NODE_PATH="$\(yarn global dir\)/node_modules:$\(npm root -g\)" node -e "try { require.resolve\('@expo/ngrok'\); console.log\('found'\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('not found'\); }")

Bash(node -e "const requireg = require\('requireg'\); try { const p = requireg.resolve\('@expo/ngrok/package.json'\); console.log\('found at:', p\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('error:', e.message\); }")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('version:', d['version']\); print\('deps:', json.dumps\({k:v for k,v in {**d.get\('dependencies',{}\),**d.get\('peerDependencies',{}\)}.items\(\) if 'worklet' in k.lower\(\)}, indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('version:', d.get\('version'\)\); print\('has native:', any\('android' in str\(d\) or 'ios' in str\(d\) for _ in [1]\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('version:', d['version']\); print\('has android:', bool\(d.get\('android'\)\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:v for k in ['peerDependencies','version','engines'] if \(v:=d.get\(k\)\) is not None}, indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('version:', d['version']\); print\('peer deps:', json.dumps\(d.get\('peerDependencies',{}\), indent=2\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('/app/frontend/node_modules/react-native-keyboard-controller/package.json'\)\); print\('version:', d['version']\); print\('peer RN:', d.get\('peerDependencies',{}\).get\('react-native','*'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('main:', p.get\('main'\)\); print\('react-native:', p.get\('react-native'\)\); print\('version:', p.get\('version'\)\)")
Bash(xargs -I{} sh -c 'echo "{}:"; python3 -c "import sys,json; p=json.load\(open\(\\"{}\\"\)\); print\(p.get\(\\"version\\", \\"?\\"\)\)"')
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('version:', p.get\('version'\)\); print\('deps:', p.get\('dependencies', {}\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(p.get\('browser', 'no browser field'\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const p = require\('/app/frontend/node_modules/punycode'\); console.log\('exports:', Object.keys\(p\)\); console.log\('has decode:', typeof p.decode\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('main:', p.get\('main'\)\); print\('deps:', json.dumps\(p.get\('dependencies',{}\), indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('browser:', p.get\('browser',{}\)\); print\('react-native:', p.get\('react-native','not set'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:v for k,v in p.items\(\) if k in ['main','module','browser','exports','version']}, indent=2\)\)")
